title: Olrac Etnom
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Olrac Etnom''''' was an Imperial [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]]. It was destroyed while stationed in the [[System Patrol Squadron]] above [[Farfeld II]].

==Behind the scenes==
The name is an anagram of ''Monte Carlo''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-03-XX -->''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
*<!-- 1996-02-XX -->[[Star Wars Adventure Journal 9|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 9]]
